productDisplayName: Crocs Crocband Flip Unisex Navy Blue Slipper
description: If you expect your footwear to be extremely comfortable coupled with great looks, you're at the right place! These Crocband flip flops from crocs pamper your feet all day long as you go about your daily chores. Pair them with just about any kind of casual wear and revel in constant comfort. Upper EVA upper in thong design with textured inside for lightweight feel, comfort and durability EVA material that moulds to the foot shape offering ample ergonomic comfort Brand button on the upper for style Midsole EVA footbed with horizontal lines in the shape of the foot for ergonomic comfort and acupressure Crocs branding on the mid heel for comfort and style Fungus, bacteria and odour resistant footbed for a healthy wear even in wet conditions Mild heel cup on the footbed to support the heel Outsole Slip resistant outsole Multi-directional textured leaf-shaped grooves in the forefoot and backfoot for ample grip, stability and comfort shoe care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust
